page.text:
Acknowledgments. The author thanks his mentor Tung Nguyen for guidance and
feedback, Professor May for organizing the REU and for his comments, and
Professor Malliaris for her comments. The structure and content of these notes
are heavily influenced by Naive Set Theory by Paul Halmos, and most of the proofs
are the same as or highly similar to those found in that text.
